description_long: This object resembles a large, flat, rectangular landform with a highly detailed, photorealistic surface texture that mimics an aerial view of a city and its surrounding terrain. The surface is mostly flat but features a dramatic, jagged elevation along one edge, resembling a mountain ridge or escarpment. The coloration is dominated by greens, browns, and grays, with intricate patterns suggesting roads, buildings, and natural features. The edges are irregular, with one side rising steeply to form a prominent, blade-like ridge. The overall form is reminiscent of a stylized or abstracted sword or knife, with the elevated ridge suggesting a blade and the flatter area resembling a handle or base. The object appears to be solid and heavy, with no visible moving parts or ornamentation.
description: A large, flat, rectangular object with a photorealistic city and terrain texture, featuring a dramatic, jagged ridge along one edge resembling a blade.
description_view_0: The object is seen from a low angle, highlighting the flat expanse and the steep, jagged ridge on the right side.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the length of the object and the pronounced elevation of the ridge along the far edge.
description_view_2: The elevated, blade-like ridge is most prominent here, rising sharply from the flat surface and dominating the left side of the object.
description_view_3: A top-down perspective reveals the detailed city and terrain texture, with the ridge forming a clear boundary along the upper edge.
attribute_blade_type: straight, single-edged, broad blade with a jagged ridge
attribute_handle_design: flat, rectangular base with no visible grip or ergonomic features
